_README: Manual quarterly data overrides — operator-verified values from 10-Q/10-K filings.
Use this layer when ALL upstream providers (yfinance, eodhd, alpha_vantage) return the same wrong number for a quarter — typically a syndication-layer bug (FactSet/CapIQ).
When patching cumulative-mislabel bugs, patch ALL line items (income + cash flow), not just revenue. Otherwise margins come out wrong.

CRITICAL — period labels are CALENDAR quarters, not fiscal. _period_label() in finance_data.py:192 derives them from the period-end month: m=Feb→1Q, May→2Q, Aug→3Q, Nov→4Q. For companies with non-calendar fiscal years (MU, NVDA, ORCL, CRM, ADBE, etc.) the calendar quarter label DOES NOT equal the fiscal quarter. Always match against the calendar quarter the period actually ends in.
Schema: { TICKER: { CALENDAR_PERIOD_LABEL: { '<Field Name>': <integer dollars>, source/verified_by/verified_on/note: '<string>' } } }.
Numeric values must be in dollars, not millions.

INCIDENT 2026-05-09: a previous MU 1Q26 entry patched real Q2 FY26 actuals ($23.86B) to Q1 FY26 actuals ($13.64B). Operator confused fiscal vs calendar quarter mapping. Entry removed. See docs/reports/2026-05-09_mu_thesis_contamination/REPORT.md and project_mu_data_bug.md memory note for the full corrigendum.
